falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average volume within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong conviction in a directional move, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' phase and suggesting a clear trend rather than indecision.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its all-time high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major index breaking to new highs would falsify the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern similarity and indicate a bull market phase, not a corrective one.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
